generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SerializedVehicleStateData, SerializedObjectTracksData, SerializedProjectedPathData
]

instance SerializedVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance SerializedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance SerializedProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SerializedVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized object tracks data from LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SerializedObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized projected driving path data for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SerializedProjectedPathData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 standard compliant data serialization and translation component for vehicle state, object tracks, and path data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for offloading ACC computations to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote operator control of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, along with data saving and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations including lead vehicle detection, desired speed calculation, and actuation command generation from vehicle ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, DesiredSpeedComputation, ActuationCommands
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote operator control of ACC system including enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACC, SetSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves vehicle state and object track data for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates system performance reports based on collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and tracking of lead vehicles for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance DesiredSpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of optimal speed based on lead vehicle and road conditions"
]

instance ActuationCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of control commands for vehicle actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableDisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable or disable of Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote setting of desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote activation of emergency braking procedure"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity hosting the 3D Visualization and Control Panel components for operator interface"
    base:contains VisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data processing and control mechanisms for computation offloading"
    base:contains DataProcessingComponent, ControlMechanismComponent
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling sensor data pre-processing and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringComponent
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time display of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operator control panel for ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking"
]

instance DataProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component handling ACC computations and data processing for offloading"
]

instance ControlMechanismComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component managing actuation commands and control logic"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for processing LiDAR point cloud data into object tracks"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE are serialized by the Data Translation component and transmitted via UDP over Wi-Fi to the Actuation FE for motor and steering servo actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations. This temporal granularity ensures synchronized operation across physical and digital components, with time scales tailored to real-time processing needs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Key deviations include the Physical Twin Entity, which hosts general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) instead of the standard OME, and the User Interface FE split into visualization and control panel components. Resource management is coordinated through ROS2-based communication across hardware-deployed entities, with strict 100 ms clock synchronization ensuring temporal alignment for safety-critical operations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 is used for internal software component communication, while inter-entity communication between physical and digital components occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The standard defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is facilitated through protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture for implementing Functional Entities, though the standard does not specify implementation methods for FEs."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "ISO 26262-1:2018 defines functional safety requirements for road vehicles, including hazard analysis, risk assessment, safety goals, and Automotive Safety Integrity Levels (ASIL) classification. 3GPP TS 22.185 specifies security requirements for V2X services, including message authentication, encryption, and secure key management protocols to ensure communication integrity and confidentiality."
]
